daily.today_energy: Your vibe is electric today, Aquarius. There's a restless curiosity pulling you forward—lean into it. The universe is basically asking you to try something that scares you a little. Trust the weird instincts.
daily.love: Authenticity is your superpower rn. Whether you're single or coupled up, showing up as your true self attracts exactly what you need. Don't dim your light to make someone comfortable. Real connections happen when you're unapologetically you.
daily.career: Your innovative thinking is hitting different today. That unconventional idea you've been sitting on? This is the moment to voice it. Your perspective matters more than you realize, and people are actually listening.
daily.health: Your nervous system might feel a bit activated—that's just your intuition working overtime. Ground yourself with something tactile: a walk, cold water, journaling. Moving your body will help channel all this mental energy into something constructive.

weekly.overview: This week's energy is all about authenticity, Aquarius. The cosmos is nudging you to lean into what makes you uniquely you instead of dimming your light for anyone. Trust the weird.
weekly.love: Whether you're coupled up or solo, the vibe is about deeper conversations and real connections. Don't settle for surface-level energy—ask the questions that actually matter to you.
weekly.career: Your ideas are hitting different right now. This is the week to pitch that unconventional project or voice your perspective in meetings. Your innovative take is exactly what's needed.
weekly.health: Your nervous system might feel a bit activated—honor that by building in some grounding practices. Whether it's time outside or just sitting with your thoughts, make space for stillness.
